text: It would seem that some numeral must have fallen out in the Hebrew text before the word meaning ‘years’ or ‘a year’; hence most versions give us the rendering, ‘Saul was one year old’.

Since no other explanation is given in the sacred text, it seems best to suppose that Saul’s disobedience consisted in not waiting till Samuel came before taking action preparatory to battle. Samuel had indicated seven days as the time of waiting (10.8), but Saul should have waited longer. See note on 10.8.
